mnemonics: FACE It: Framework Activities Guide Everything (Communication, Planning, Modeling, Construction, Deployment)
keyPoints: Communication Principles: Focus on clear requirements gathering and stakeholder collaboration
Planning Principles: Emphasize realistic estimation, risk management, and adaptable schedules
Modeling Principles: Create models that provide insight and are understandable to all stakeholders
Construction Principles: Ensure code quality through standards, testing, and verification
Deployment Principles: Deliver value to customer with proper training and feedback mechanisms
commonMistakes: Treating all framework activities equally rather than weighting them based on project needs
Applying principles rigidly without adapting to specific project context
Neglecting communication principles which leads to misunderstood requirements
